item.title: Version 1.4.4-pre-8
item.description:
Version 1.4.4-pre-8

  • Fixed: detect stale sudoers path by dry-running helper instead of sudo -n -l

item.title: Version 1.4.4-7
item.description:
Version 1.4.4-7

  • Fixed: CI inserts enclosure when missing from manual sparkle entries
  • New: use TCC private API for App Management permission detection
  • ci: force checkout main when pushing appcast from non-main branches
  • New: Sparkle pre-release channel with opt-in toggle
  • New: add App Management (TCC) permission check to setup flow

item.title: Version 1.4.4-6
item.description:
Version 1.4.4-6

  • Fixed: CI appcast handling, pipe deadlock, and main thread blocking

item.title: Version 1.4.4-pre-3
item.description:
Version 1.4.4-pre-3

  • Fixed: CI inserts enclosure when missing from manual sparkle entries

item.title: Version 1.4.4-pre-2
item.description:
Version 1.4.4-pre-2

  • Improved: App Management permission detection using TCC framework

item.title: Version 1.4.4-5
item.description:
Version 1.4.4-5

  • Fixed: Permission setup detection on corporate/managed Macs

item.title: Version 1.4.4-4
item.description:
Version 1.4.4-4

  • Improved: Delta updates now cover all recent releases

item.title: Version 1.4.4-3
item.description:
Version 1.4.4-3

  • Fixed: Folder icon changes now work correctly
  • Fixed: API usage counter accuracy for deduplicated requests
  • Improved: Masked API key display in settings
  • Improved: Usage display refreshes after API test

item.title: Version 1.4.4-2
item.description:
Version 1.4.4-2

  • Improved: API usage tracker now syncs with server-side rate limit responses
  • Improved: Settings confirmation dialogs

item.title: Version 1.4.4-1
item.description:
Version 1.4.4-1

  • Fixed: Improved handling of server-side rate limiting (HTTP 429) in request retry loop

item.title: Version 1.4.4
item.description:
Version 1.4.4

  • New: Smarter folder icon search — finds folder-style icons from macosicons.com
  • New: Extended Search option for broader icon results
  • New: Click version number to copy in About settings
  • Improved: Case-insensitive query deduplication saves API calls
  • Improved: Streamlined API request headers
  • Fixed: Timer race conditions on rapid UI interactions

item.title: Version 1.4.3
item.description:
Version 1.4.3

New Features

  • New: Dock Preview wallpaper now bleeds under the sidebar with a toggle setting
  • New: Adjustable wallpaper Spread and Blur sliders in Display Settings
  • New: Alias name support for folder icons

Security

  • Security: Helper files moved to root-owned /usr/local/lib/iconchanger/ — an admin password prompt will appear on first use after this update
  • Security: Sudoers permission scoped to current user only
  • Security: Eliminated shell injection risk in helper tool execution
  • Security: Helper script input validation and SHA-256 integrity verification

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed: Primary app icon now correctly sorted first in Local icon list
  • Fixed: Legacy helper files automatically cleaned up after migration

item.title: Version 1.4.2-2
item.description:
Version 1.4.2-2

  • New: increase Dock Preview wallpaper bleed area
  • Fixed: use Xcode CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION for Sparkle build numbers
  • Fixed: YAML indentation in build.yml breaking workflow parse
  • ci: auto-generate Sparkle release notes from changelog
  • Fixed: Sparkle update detection and missing release notes

item.title: Version 1.4.2-1
item.description:
Version 1.4.2-1 — Hotfix

Fixes raw JSON error messages being displayed to users.

  • Fixed: 404 responses now show "No Icons Found" instead of a raw JSON error
  • Fixed: API errors display clean messages instead of dumping JSON response bodies
  • Fixed: Connection test shows clear messages for 429, 401/403, and 5xx errors

Version 1.4.2

  • New: Icon Favorites — right-click any icon to save it to favorites
  • New: Icon History — view past icon changes for each app
  • New: Folder Icon Customization — add folders and change their icons
  • New: API Rate Limiting — monthly usage tracking with configurable limits
  • New: Configurable retry count and request timeout in Settings
  • New: Distinct error messages for different API failure modes
  • Fixed: Dock Preview hidden for Folders filter, filters apply correctly
  • Fixed: Dock Preview icons refresh consistently with sidebar
  • Fixed: Infinite spinner for folders in Local icons section
  • Docs: 30 language translations on the documentation site

item.title: Version 1.4.2
item.description:
Version 1.4.2

  • New: Icon Favorites — right-click any icon to save it to favorites
  • New: Icon History — view past icon changes for each app
  • New: Folder Icon Customization — add folders and change their icons
  • New: API Rate Limiting — monthly usage tracking with configurable limits
  • New: Configurable retry count and request timeout in Settings
  • New: Distinct error messages for different API failure modes
  • Fixed: Dock Preview hidden for Folders filter, filters apply correctly
  • Fixed: Dock Preview icons refresh consistently with sidebar
  • Fixed: Infinite spinner for folders in Local icons section
  • Docs: 30 language translations on the documentation site

item.title: Version 1.4.1
item.description:
Version 1.4.1

  • New: Persistent API result caching with settings toggle
  • Perf: Race condition fix in request deduplication
  • Perf: StateObject, Equatable, and caching optimizations
  • Fixed: Drag temp file cleanup and duplicate name refresh

item.title: Version 1.4.0
item.description:
Version 1.4.0

  • New: Liquid Glass dock frame with adjustable intensity slider
  • New: Transparent toolbar and extended wallpaper bleed effect
  • Fixed: Persistent DockPreviewBar and performance optimizations

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
Version 1.3.0

  • New: One-click permission setup — no more manual sudoers editing.
  • New: Restore default app icons (fully restores macOS 26 icon features).
  • Fix: Icons not loading when scrolling sidebar quickly.
  • Fix: Shell injection prevention and security hardening.
  • Fix: Thread safety and performance improvements.
  • Perf: Replaced debug print() with os.Logger for better release performance.

item.title: Version 1.2.1
item.description:
Version 1.2.1

  • Update: Bug Fix.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
Version 1.2.0

  • Update: Bug Fix.

item.title: Version 1.1.9
item.description:
Version 1.1.9

  • Update: Bug Fix.

item.title: Version 1.1.8
item.description:
Version 1.1.8

  • Fix: Resolved the Sparkle updater startup error popup.

item.title: Version 1.1.7
item.description:
Version 1.1.7

  • New Feature: Custom App Folders - You can now customize which directories are scanned for applications in Settings.
  • Improved App Detection - Switched to a robust filesystem scanner, removing dependency on the Launchpad database for better reliability.
  • Live Updates - Sidebar icons now refresh immediately after you change them.
  • Bug Fix - Resolved the "Update checker failed to start" issue by optimizing the update configuration.

item.title: Version 1.1.6
item.description:
Version 1.1.6 – Background Reliability & Icon Refresh

  • Reworked background scheduling with dispatch timers for more reliable auto-restore and cache cleanup.
  • Added a toolbar refresh button and automatic triggers so the icon list stays in sync after changes.
  • Actor-ified the shared image loader and switched to structured logging for faster, safer icon downloads.

item.title: Version 1.1.5
item.description:
Version 1.1.5 - fix

fix: macOS 26 IconList page button display issue.

item.title: Version 1.1.4
item.description:
🎨 Version 1.1.4 - Icon Style Filtering & Smart Caching

New features for better icon browsing and improved performance!

Special thanks to @CantonMonkey for contributing this release!

✨ New Features

  • 🎭 Icon Style Filtering: Browse icons by style - now with Liquid Glass support!
  • - Select icon styles from a dropdown menu while browsing
  • - Extensible design for future style additions (Classic, Minimal, Colorful coming soon)
  • ⚡ Smart LRU Cache System: Intelligent caching for faster icon loading
  • - Automatically caches icon search results for 10 minutes
  • - LRU (Least Recently Used) eviction when cache is full
  • - Thread-safe with up to 500 cached entries
  • - Automatic cleanup every 10 minutes

🔧 Improvements

  • Enhanced Validation: Better error handling for icon data
  • Improved Performance: Reduced network requests with smart caching
  • Code Quality: Refactored icon initialization with validation

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed cache cleanup strategy to properly implement LRU behavior
  • Fixed timer interval for cache cleanup (now correctly 10 minutes)
  • Added proper nil handling for invalid icon data

Tip: Try the new style filter when browsing icons - it makes finding the perfect icon style much easier!

item.title: Version 1.1.3
item.description:
✨ Version 1.1.3 - Setup Improvements & Fixes

Fixing issues related to sudoers permissions.

  • 📝 Improved: Provides clearer and more specific setup instructions if sudoers permissions are missing or invalid.
  • ⚙️ Change & Note: Updated the recommended sudoers rule in the setup instructions to ALL ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: [SCRIPT_PATH] for better reliability across different environments.
    (Note: This manual sudoers configuration method is used because the standard macOS approach for privileged operations requires code signing and notarization, which necessitates a paid Apple Developer account. As a student developer, this isn't currently feasible. This alternative allows the core functionality to be used without that requirement. Thank you for your understanding.)
  • 🐛 Fixed: Improved error handling and logging when executing the helper script, especially for sudo failures.
  • 🌍 Localization: Updated and added localizations for new UI text and instructions (Chinese, Japanese, French, etc.).

Updating is recommended for all users. If you upgrade from an older version and encounter issues, you may need to update your sudoers file according to the new in-app instructions.

item.title: Version 1.1.1 - URGENT Update
item.description:
🚨 URGENT: IconChanger 1.1.1 🛠️

This is an urgent update that fixes a critical crash issue. All users should update immediately.

  • 🐛 FIXED: Critical crash issue when handling images (thread safety improvements)
  • 🔄 Improved: API testing functionality with better error handling
  • ✨ Enhanced: User interface and display optimizations
  • ⚡️ Performance: Overall stability and responsiveness improvements

Thank you for using IconChanger! 🙏

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
IconChanger 1.1.0 ⌘

  • NEW: Command line interface for icon management
  • NEW: Import/export configurations via CLI
  • NEW: Install CLI tool directly from Settings
  • NEW: Integration with dotfiles for automation

  • Improved configuration handling system
  • Enhanced error handling and feedback

item.title: Version 1.0.6
item.description:
IconChanger 1.0.6 📜

    FIX: Resolving macOS 13 Compatibility

item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description:
IconChanger 1.0.5 📦

  • NEW: Configuration import and export system
  • - Share your custom icons and app aliases between Macs
  • - Back up your custom icon setup with one click

To use the new configuration features, go to Settings → Configuration.

item.title: Version 1.0.4
item.description:
IconChanger 1.0.4 🥳

  • NEW: Customizable time selection for scheduled icon restoration
  • Bug fixes and stability improvements

item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description:
IconChanger 1.0.3

  • NEW: Background service mode - run app in menu bar or dock
  • NEW: Automatic icon restoration on scheduled intervals
  • NEW: App update detection with automatic icon restoration
  • NEW: Quick access to common functions via menu bar
  • Enhanced icon caching system with improved reliability
  • UI refinements and performance optimizations
  • Fixed issues with certain icon types not loading properly

item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description:
IconChanger 1.0.2

  • NEW: Icon caching system - automatically remember all applied custom icons
  • NEW: Restore all cached icons after app updates with one click
  • NEW: Icon Cache management in settings allows selective icon restoration
  • Improved loading performance for large icon sets
  • Various UI improvements and bug fixes

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
IconChanger 1.0.1

  • Improved icon loading process
  • Added icon loading status indicator
  • Removed invalid icons display for a cleaner interface
  • Added icon counter display (loaded/total)
  • Fixed issues with some icons failing to load

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
IconChanger 1.0.0

  • 迁移到新的 Meilisearch API
  • 添加了多语言支持 (英文、法文、中文)
  • 改进用户界面设计
  • 修复了图标下载问题
  • 增强错误处理和日志记录
